name: What proof do I need for my warehouse accident claim in Millcreek?

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my warehouse accident claim in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Incident report, medical records, witnesses, photos, pay stubs.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Gather incident reports, medical records, witness statements, photos, and wage statements.**[6]

Workers' comp requires showing the injury arose out of and in the course of employment. Insurers scrutinize causation.

- Employer incident form is key first document.
- Doctor notes linking injury to work.
- Payroll records for wage loss.
- Videos/surveillance if available.

Preserve evidence before it disappears. An attorney obtains records and counters denials effectively.

description: Incident report, medical records, witnesses, photos, pay stubs.[6]
